docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,078.00 FILED BY SINGH, NARENDRA AS TO DEFENDANT METRY, ADEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$81.00) SERVED NOV-01-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT METRY, ADEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-20-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NARENDRA SINGH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADEL METRY IS PRESENT. AT THE START OF THE 8:30 A.M CALENDAR, DEFENDANT ADEL METRY IS PRESENT WITH HIS SON, JONATHAN METRY. PLAINTIFF NARENDRA SINGH WAS NOT PRESENT AT 8:30 A.M. AT 8:45 A.M. DEFENDANTS ARE INFOMRED THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT AND THE MATTER WOULD BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR "NO APPEARANCES" DEFENDANTS ARE EXCUSED FROM THE COURTROOM. PLAINTIFF APPEARS IN COURT AT 8:46 A.M. AFTER THE DEFENDANTS HAVE LEFT THE COURTROOM. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT THEY WERE LATE DUE TO TRAFFIC AND THAT THEY CONTACTED SOMEONE AT THE COURT AND NOTIFIED THAT PERSON THAT THEY WOULD BE LATE AND THEY WERE TOLD THIS WOULD NOT BE A PROBLEM. PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO PROVIDE THE NAME OF THE PERSON THEY SPOKE WITH. MATTER IS PLACED BACK ON CALENDAR AND CONTINUED. DEFENDANT IS CALLED AND NOTIFED BY VOICEMAIL MESSAGE THAT THIS MATTER HAS BEEN CONTINUED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-20-2023 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
